foundation_review.confidence: HIGH — all 3 root causes independently confirmed via code evidence

root_causes_confirmed.title: Unscoped SDK client — 42 API sub-classes exposed to all plugins with zero gating
Capability registration happens AFTER plugin.server() executes — registry is empty during init
root_causes_confirmed.plan_fix: fix-D must reorder: manifest extraction → register → proxy → server()

root_causes_confirmed.title: Raw Bun.$ placed in PluginInput with zero capability gate

fix_dependency_order.rationale: RC2 must be fixed first because RC1's Proxy needs non-null registry state at call time. RC3 can proceed in parallel if shell proxy uses same registry, but if routed through SDK client (option A), it depends on RC1.
fix_dependency_order.plan_apply_order: Already correct: fix-A (types) → fix-B (map) → fix-C (proxy) → fix-D (timing reorder) → fix-E (consent)

foundation_review.claim_adversary_pass_result: ALL 5 defense claims falsified: HookDispatchGuard doesn't cover SDK, server has zero plugin auth, shell.env hook doesn't gate $, FALLBACK_MANIFEST registered too late, simple Proxy fails due to empty registry. No defense in depth exists at any layer.
